content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally today across multiple sectors — defense (GRSE +9.2%, HAL +1.55%), pharma (AUROPHARMA +7.61%, LUPIN +4.33%), FMCG (MARICO +4.84%, DABUR +4.36%), IT midcap (COFORGE +11.07%), capital goods (TITAGARH +9.84%), and financial services (CAMS +10.46%, ABCAPITAL +6.61%). Most held positions are in profit. Global cues supportive (US markets +1.46% to +2.02%). Late session — 50 min to close — focus on locking in gains via SL trails, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 984, CMP 1056.70 (+7.4%). Current SL 1035 already locks in ~5.2% gain — above breakeven. CMP-to-SL gap is ~2.05% which respects the 1% trail-gap minimum. Holding SL where it is; thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%). No-op MODIFY avoided — this is a HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already locks +5.2% gain with 2% gap to CMP 1056.70. Target 1110 ~5% away. Thesis intact post Q4 results. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 125.10, CMP 124.12 (-0.78%). Below entry but within SL 121. MACD bearish crossover but price holding above 20DMA. Defensive hedge position; let it work. No SL change — already at 121 which is acceptable."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1700, CMP 1757.10 (+3.36%). Current SL already at 1735 (+2.06% gain locked). CMP-to-SL gap = 1.26% — at the floor of 1% but acceptable. Q4 strong (Rev +26.5%, EBITDA margin 56%). 52w high broken. Holding SL — no-op avoided, this is HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 4575, CMP 4630.40 (+1.21%). SL 4540 just below entry (-0.76%). Gain not yet ≥+2% threshold to trail to breakeven mandatorily. Defense theme strong (GRSE +9.2%). Hold current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 6900, CMP 7049 (+2.16%). Trigger (a) of trailing mandate met (+2% gain, SL below entry at 6960... actually 6960 is ABOVE entry already). Re-checking: SL 6960 is already above entry 6900 — breakeven+ already locked. CMP-to-SL gap = (7049-6960)/7049 = 1.26% — respects 1% floor. Keep SL at 6960 (no-op). Issuing HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 already above entry 6900 — gain locked. CMP 7049, gap to SL 1.26% (above 1% floor). Q4 PAT +124% YoY, EBITDA margin 34.2%. Hold for target 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 838, CMP 845.20 (+0.86%). Current SL 836 (-0.24% below entry). Gain not yet ≥+2% — mandatory trail to breakeven not yet triggered. However stock just printed +9.84% intraday on rolling stock rally. Tightening SL DOWN from 836 to 815 would LOOSEN — guardrail will reject. Keep SL at 836; this is a HOLD. Q4 results pending in May = binary risk in next 1-2 weeks; will re-assess. No MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 838, CMP 845.20. SL 836 stays. Q4 board meeting pending — flagging as binary event for next session disposition. Today still HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 369, CMP 368.70 (-0.08%). SL 365 already in place. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },

      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

      "product": "CNC",

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 820, CMP 822.55 (+0.31%). SL 815 (-0.61% below entry) — stays. No-op MODIFY → HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +18% YoY, volume +9%. Hit 52w high today. Slight gain only — no trail trigger yet. Hold SL 815."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 1259, CMP 1279.10 (+1.6%). SL 1260 right at entry. Gain not yet at +2% trail-to-breakeven trigger but SL already at breakeven. Strong Q4 (Rev +30%), Encora deal closed. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 3025, CMP 3034 (+0.30%). SL 3000 (-0.83% below entry). Insufficient gain yet to trail. Defense rally strong, FY26 PAT +41.8%. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 806, CMP 807.30 (+0.16%). SL 798 (-0.99% below entry). Marginal gain — no trail trigger. Q4 record revenue print. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",

  "watchlist_notes": "LUPIN/AUROPHARMA: pharma momentum strong but Lupin has Q4 print TODAY — binary risk; cannot enter pre-results without sizing as event-trade. Will reassess tomorrow on confirmed data. POLYCAB: at 52w high post strong Q4 — consider on a pullback to 8200-8300 zone. M&M, BAJAJ-AUTO: auto theme active but BAJAJ-AUTO already exited at loss prior session (cooldown applies). HFCL pending BUY at 133.50 still OPEN — leaving alone for now per order hygiene. Late session (50 min to close) — no new MIS entries appropriate; CNC entries deferred to fresh session.",
  "portfolio_notes": "11 CNC positions, all in modest profit or near flat after a strong session. Cash deployed ~80% (within target). Cumulative P&L -53.72% from start is severe — discipline phase: protect gains, avoid churn, let winners breathe with current SLs. Multiple positions are within 1-2% of entry — trail-SL mandate not yet triggered for most. TITAGARH Q4 results pending in May = binary event; if confirmed within 3 sessions, will tighten SL or reduce. No new entries today given (a) late session, (b) risk-budget already at 80% deployed, (c) Lupin/Dabur Q4 binary today, (d) HFCL order still pending. Cluster check: defense (HAL+GRSE) ~17%, financial services (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS) ~22% — at cluster watch threshold; no additions to either cluster."
}
